name: deepwork
description: Research/design convergence via a 5-archetype oppositional team (Falsifier/Coverage/Mechanism/Reframer/Critic). Operationalizes the team pattern proven on Proposal D v3-final: written bar with categorical bans, required reframing, file:line anchors, independent cross-checks for nulls, live empiricism on load-bearing unknowns, named versioning, guardrail accumulation from incidents, default-off shipping for residual risk. Orchestrator designs the team dynamically per problem; CRITIC is the only invariant role. Delivers via ExitPlanMode; never crosses into implementation.
